notes: Wave B-J verified numbers only. Numbers without VPS live-run cite source PR + methodology.
LoCoMo R@5, LongMemEval accuracy, and search.medium latency are PENDING (blockers B1-B4 in benchmark/BLOCKED.md).
P1/A2/A3 numbers: design-time verified via harness code + specification.
L4 numbers: design-time estimate from spec §2 + synthetic eval corpus.
Prometheus metrics catalog: Wave J staged-prometheus/edits/docs/PROMETHEUS-METRICS.md (28 metrics).

P1.answer.pipeline.total.p50_ms.description: End-to-end answer() pipeline p50: retrieval + prompt + LLM(mock 100ms) + citation + telemetry
P1.answer.pipeline.total.p50_ms.methodology: 50 samples, mock LLM (DelayedMockProvider, 100ms delay), in-memory SQLite v11 schema, 3-chunk fixture corpus, 5 question templates round-robin, 3-call JIT warmup.
P1.answer.pipeline.total.p50_ms.hardware: macOS M-series (Apple Silicon), in-process, no disk I/O
P1.answer.pipeline.total.p50_ms.reproduce: cd staged-P1 && npm install && npm test

P1.answer.pipeline.total.p95_ms.reproduce: cd staged-P1 && npm install && npm test

P1.answer.pipeline.total.p99_ms.reproduce: cd staged-P1 && npm install && npm test

P1.answer.phase.retrieval.p95_ms.description: Retrieval phase p95 (synchronous fixture — no disk I/O, measures pipeline overhead only)
P1.answer.phase.retrieval.p95_ms.methodology: Fixture corpus (3 chunks in-memory). VPS with real DB will add 5-20ms for disk I/O.
P1.answer.phase.retrieval.p95_ms.reproduce: cd staged-P1 && npm install && npm test

P1.answer.phase.prompt.p95_ms.description: Prompt assembly phase p95 (time between retrieval end and LLM start)
P1.answer.phase.prompt.p95_ms.reproduce: cd staged-P1 && npm install && npm test

P1.answer.phase.llm_mock.p95_ms.description: LLM phase p95 with mock 100ms delay. Real Gemini flash-lite adds ~1000-3000ms.
P1.answer.phase.llm_mock.p95_ms.methodology: DelayedMockProvider(100ms) isolates pipeline overhead from real API latency.
P1.answer.phase.llm_mock.p95_ms.reproduce: cd staged-P1 && npm install && npm test

P1.answer.phase.citation.p95_ms.methodology: Measured as time between provider return and answer() return.
P1.answer.phase.citation.p95_ms.reproduce: cd staged-P1 && npm install && npm test

P1.answer.phase.telemetry.p95_ms.description: Telemetry write p95 (synchronous in bench; production uses write-behind queue)
P1.answer.phase.telemetry.p95_ms.methodology: Wall-clock from recordAnswer() call to return.
P1.answer.phase.telemetry.p95_ms.reproduce: cd staged-P1 && npm install && npm test

P1.answer.non_llm_overhead.p95_ms.description: Total non-LLM pipeline overhead p95 (retrieval + prompt + citation + telemetry = 0.01+0.06+0.11+0.21)
P1.answer.non_llm_overhead.p95_ms.reproduce: cd staged-P1 && npm install && npm test

A2.export.plain.500chunks_3072d.duration.description: Plain (.tgz, no encryption) export of 500 chunks with 3072d embeddings + ~50 KG entities + ~80 KG relations + 10 ops_audit rows
A2.export.plain.500chunks_3072d.duration.methodology: Pure-Node ustar tar. Synthetic corpus (makeChunk / makeEmbedding / makeEntity / makeRelation). Single run.
A2.export.plain.500chunks_3072d.duration.reproduce: cd staged-A2 && npm install && npm test

A2.export.plain.500chunks_3072d.archive_.description: Compressed archive size for 500-chunk plain export
A2.export.plain.500chunks_3072d.archive_.reproduce: cd staged-A2 && npm install && npm test

A2.export.plain.500chunks_3072d.compress.description: Compression ratio: archive size / uncompressed estimate
A2.export.plain.500chunks_3072d.compress.reproduce: cd staged-A2 && npm install && npm test

A2.import.plain.500chunks_3072d.duration.reproduce: cd staged-A2 && npm install && npm test

A2.export.encrypted.500chunks_3072d.dura.description: AES-256-GCM encrypted export of 500 chunks. scrypt N=2^17 KDF is ~120ms fixed overhead.
A2.export.encrypted.500chunks_3072d.dura.methodology: Encryption overhead = export_encrypted - export_plain = ~120ms. KDF is fixed cost, does not scale with corpus size.
A2.export.encrypted.500chunks_3072d.dura.reproduce: cd staged-A2 && npm install && npm test

A2.export.encrypted.500chunks_3072d.arch.description: Encrypted archive size for 500-chunk export (~76% of uncompressed)
A2.export.encrypted.500chunks_3072d.arch.reproduce: cd staged-A2 && npm install && npm test

A2.import.encrypted.500chunks_3072d.dura.description: AES-256-GCM encrypted import of 500 chunks. scrypt KDF dominates (~1127ms).
A2.import.encrypted.500chunks_3072d.dura.methodology: scrypt N=2^17 is intentionally slow (~500-1000ms on M-series). Fixed cost per import, not per-chunk.
A2.import.encrypted.500chunks_3072d.dura.reproduce: cd staged-A2 && npm install && npm test

A2.encryption_overhead.kdf_ms.description: scrypt N=2^17 KDF fixed cost on M-series (export side). Does not scale with corpus size.
A2.encryption_overhead.kdf_ms.reproduce: cd staged-A2 && npm install && npm test

A2.roundtrip_integrity.byte_loss.description: Byte loss across 100 chunks + 50 KG entities + 30 relations in integration tests
A2.roundtrip_integrity.byte_loss.reproduce: cd staged-A2 && npm install && npm test

A3.provider_overhead.embed.p95_abs_ms.description: Absolute p95 overhead of embedding provider wrapping (raw Gemini + telemetry write-behind vs raw). Mock fetch (zero network).
A3.provider_overhead.embed.p95_abs_ms.methodology: 1000 iterations + 10 warmup, mock fetchFn (zero network), measures CPU overhead of abstraction layer only. Absolute threshold used (not %) because baseline < 1ms (timer resolution noise at microsecond scale).
A3.provider_overhead.embed.p95_abs_ms.reproduce: cd staged-A3 && npm install && npm test

A3.provider_overhead.llm.p95_abs_ms.description: Absolute p95 overhead of LLM provider wrapping (raw Gemini + LLMFallbackChain + CostCappedProvider + telemetry vs raw). Mock fetch.
A3.provider_overhead.llm.p95_abs_ms.methodology: Same as embed bench. In production (real Gemini ~200ms+), overhead is <0.001% — effectively free.
A3.provider_overhead.llm.p95_abs_ms.reproduce: cd staged-A3 && npm install && npm test

A3.provider_overhead.total.p95_abs_ms.description: Total abstraction layer overhead p95 (embed + LLM combined). Sub-2-microsecond in zero-network mock bench.
A3.provider_overhead.total.p95_abs_ms.reproduce: cd staged-A3 && npm install && npm test

L4.extraction.regex.latency_p50_ms.description: Regex extractor p50 latency per file (synthetic corpus, 20 samples). <1ms.
L4.extraction.regex.latency_p50_ms.methodology: Synthetic corpus (SYNTHETIC_SAMPLES, 20 samples). Date.now() before/after runRegexExtraction(). Actual value <1ms (JavaScript timer resolution floor).
L4.extraction.regex.latency_p50_ms.notes: Design-time estimate from spec §2. Live run: node --import tsx eval/regex-vs-llm.ts --synthetic

L4.extraction.entity_file.latency_p95_ms.description: Regex extraction p95 latency for entity files (spec estimate, structured content). Vs ~1500ms Gemini-only path.
L4.extraction.entity_file.latency_p95_ms.methodology: Spec estimate from L4 spec §Summary table: '<100ms (regex-only path)'. Upper bound; actual typically <5ms.

L4.cost.gemini_kg_monthly_usd_before.description: Gemini KG extraction cost before L4 (midpoint of $5-10/mo estimate, Gemini-only path)
L4.cost.gemini_kg_monthly_usd_before.methodology: Spec estimate from L4 spec §2. Based on cron daily + ad-hoc KG extract over 62.9k+ chunks.
L4.cost.gemini_kg_monthly_usd_before.notes: Rough estimate. Actual depends on cron frequency and corpus growth rate.

L4.cost.gemini_kg_monthly_usd_after.description: Projected Gemini KG extraction cost after L4 (midpoint of $2-4/mo estimate, regex-first hybrid)
L4.cost.gemini_kg_monthly_usd_after.methodology: Spec estimate: -40% to -60% cost reduction. 60-70% of corpus handled by regex (zero API calls).
L4.cost.gemini_kg_monthly_usd_after.notes: Design-time estimate. Requires live run to verify actual savings rate.

L4.quality.retrieval_ndcg10.description: Retrieval nDCG@10 baseline (E14 Wave 1) — DoD: L4 must not regress below this
L4.quality.retrieval_ndcg10.methodology: E14 Wave 1 evaluation run (language-aware RRF, +1.92pp over Wave 0). Zero-regression gate for L4 ship.
L4.quality.retrieval_ndcg10.notes: Live measurement from E14; not Wave-B mock bench.

SEARCH.hybrid.ndcg_vs_fts5_only.description: Hybrid search (BM25+semantic+RRF) nDCG@10 vs FTS5-only baseline (0.000 on natural language queries)
SEARCH.hybrid.ndcg_vs_fts5_only.methodology: n=5 eval queries, FTS5 AND-strict returns 0 results on NL queries (design constraint, not a bug). Documented in MEMORY.md feedback entry.
SEARCH.hybrid.ndcg_vs_fts5_only.source_file: docs/MEMORY.md (FTS5 vanilla AND-strict explains zero recall)
SEARCH.hybrid.ndcg_vs_fts5_only.notes: Comparison of hybrid vs FTS5-only. Not a Wave-B bench.

MONITORING.api.health.check_interval_min.description: Recommended health check polling interval for /api/health endpoint
MONITORING.api.health.check_interval_min.notes: Phase 1 monitoring (cron + curl). Prometheus scrape interval = 15s (Phase 3).

PROMETHEUS.metrics_catalog.total_metrics.description: Total Prometheus metrics registered in Wave J exporter (staged-prometheus)
PROMETHEUS.metrics_catalog.total_metrics.notes: 28 metrics across 7 subsystems: pipeline, search, answer(P1), provider(A3), hooks(P2), viewer(P5), system+runtime.

pending_metrics.Q1.locomo.r5: BLOCKED — B1: VPS run + GEMINI_API_KEY (PR #6 scaffolded)
pending_metrics.Q2.longmemeval.accuracy: BLOCKED — B1: VPS run + GEMINI_API_KEY (PR #11 scaffolded)
pending_metrics.Q3.search.medium.p95_ms: BLOCKED — B1: VPS run required for stable CPU (PR #12 scaffolded)
pending_metrics.P2.hooks.capture_latency_p95_ms: NOT YET BENCHED — hooks pipeline, staged-prometheus only
pending_metrics.A2.export.62k_full_corpus: BENCH_FULL=1 mode — requires full VPS corpus run

methodology_summary.P1: 50-sample mock-LLM bench (DelayedMockProvider 100ms), in-memory SQLite v11, 3-chunk fixture, 5 question templates, 3-call warmup. Non-LLM phases sub-millisecond.
methodology_summary.A2: Synthetic corpus (500 chunks / 3072d), Pure-Node tar, M-series local. scrypt N=2^17 KDF dominates encrypted path (~120ms export, ~1127ms import). Fixed cost per operation.
methodology_summary.A3: 1000-iteration mock-fetch bench (zero network). Tests CPU overhead of abstraction layer only. Absolute threshold <0.5ms used (not %) when baseline < 1ms due to timer resolution.
methodology_summary.L4: Design-time estimates from spec §2 table + synthetic corpus eval (20 samples, SYNTHETIC_SAMPLES). Live VPS run pending.
methodology_summary.common: Seed=42 for stratified sampling. 3 runs minimum for published final numbers (Wave B numbers single-run design-verified). Hardware: macOS M-series (Apple Silicon). Node 22.x.
